title: ruellia terminalis var. terminalis
intro: Ruellia terminalis var. terminalis, also known as the Mexican Petunia or Thai Petunia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ruellia terminalis var. terminalis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
